steps.title: Find the radius
steps.content:
Use the circumference formula for the circular base:
$$10\pi=2\pi r$$
$$r=5$$

steps.title: Use the cylinder volume
steps.content:
The base area is $\pi r^2$, and multiplying by the height gives the cylinder volume. Use $r=5$ and height $13$:
$$V=\pi(5)^2(13)$$
$$V=325\pi$$
The answer is C.
